'''Cassander Tadrin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Esselian]] space explorer who discovered a [[Cassander|planet]] in what became the [[Cassander system/Legends|Cassander system]] one hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the fall of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He then went on to form the colony which would expand to become the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran sectors]]. Prior to the discovery he was the head of a giant, privately held [[Esselian conglomerate]] that controlled 24 agriworlds.

==Biography==
Cassander Tadrin was known in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to one of the most a wealthiest businessmen. A [[Standard century/Legends|century]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] began, he served as the the leader of a large and private [[Esselian conglomerate|conglomerate]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] worlds. Finally, Tadrin launched a research venture in which he sent numerous reconnaissance droids to comb out previously unexplored regions in the galaxy. Finally he got the desired results: various undiscovered worlds with great resources. Therefore, he now began to dissolve the conglomerate and sold the possessions of the company. After this step, he sought out tens of thousands of loyal followers and workers and began an expedition with their families to the newly discovered worlds he inhabited. Cassander became the capital of his new empire, which he called the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]]. Gradually, his influence spread to many other systems, eventually adding to mineral resources or other resource-rich worlds such as [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]], [[Minashee/Legends|Minashee]], [[New Bakstre]], [[Biitu]], [[Forsen]], [[Isiring]], and [[Monhudle]] to over 100 other planets in the Cassandran worlds. Eventually, Tadrin Cassander [[Death/Legends|passed away]], but the worlds continued to develop and eventually became an important part of interstellar commerce.
